info.DAtuviSezaH: guptijkidByaH san 3.1.5 ityanena asmAt DAtoH 'kzamAyAm' asmin arTe svArTe 'san' pratyayaH viDIyate  anyezu arTezu tu curAdigaRavat rUpARi Bavanti
info.english_meaning: to sharpen to whet to endure to tolerate to bear to forgive
info.hindI_arTa: tIkzRa karanA DAra lagAnA camakAnA kzamA karanA sahanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ( tiji kzamAyAM nityasan ) niSAnam = tIkzRIkaraRam  ' kzamAyAm ca ' iti kzIrasvAmI
